title: Add Brave Search API backend
description: Add Brave Search API as a fallback search engine. Brave provides a clean REST API with 2000 free requests per month at 1 req/sec. Endpoint: GET https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search with X-Subscription-Token header. Returns JSON with title, URL, description. Good fallback when SearXNG is unreachable.

title: Add Tavily Search API backend
description: Add Tavily Search API as a fallback or explicit engine option. Tavily is optimized for LLMs and returns URLs plus optional extracted content inline. 1000 free credits per month. Endpoint: POST https://api.tavily.com/search with Bearer token. Unique feature: include_raw_content=true returns page content directly, reducing need for separate scrpr call.

title: Add query history feature
description:
# Problem
No query history feature - users must retype previous searches.

# Proposed Solution
- Add sx history command to show recent searches
- Store history in $XDG_STATE_HOME/sx/history
- Add up-arrow navigation in interactive mode
- Add --history flag to show history instead of searching
- Limit history to last 100 queries (configurable)

# Data Format
Store as TOML or simple line-delimited with timestamp

title: Standardize category naming convention
description:
# Problem
Category 'social+media' uses inconsistent naming with a + sign while others use simple names or hyphens.

# Proposed Solution
- Change 'social+media' to 'social-media' for consistency
- Maintain backward compatibility by accepting both
- Deprecate + notation with warning

# Categories to Support
- general, news, videos, images, music, map, science, it, files, social-media

title: Add GitHub release workflow with AUR + Homebrew publishing
Remove redundant --link flag alias
description:
# Problem
Two flags --link and --links-only (-L) do the same thing, causing confusion.

# Proposed Solution
- Remove --link flag
- Keep only -L, --links-only
- Deprecate --link with warning for one release, then remove

# Benefits
- Cleaner CLI interface
- Reduced confusion for users

title: Fix version flag to display version instead of searching
description:
# Problem
The --version flag does not work. Running 'sx version' or 'sx --version' performs a search instead of showing the version.

# Proposed Solution
- Fix cobra's version handling
- Ensure 'sx --version' outputs the version string
- Add version to help output as well

# Related Code
main.go - cobra Command definition needs Version field set properly

title: Add pluggable search backend architecture
description: Refactor sx to support pluggable search backends via a common interface. Create SearchBackend interface with Search() method. Implement SearxngBackend (existing), BraveBackend, TavilyBackend. Add config: engine=searxng, fallback_engines=[brave,tavily]. Auto-retry with fallback on connection errors. Each backend maps its response format to sx's SearchResult struct.

title: Add shell completion support
description:
# Problem
No shell completions available for bash, zsh, or fish.

# Proposed Solution
- Add sx completion <shell> command using cobra's completion generator
- Support bash, zsh, fish, and PowerShell
- Add installation instructions to README

# Benefits
- Faster CLI usage
- Discovery of available flags and options
- Professional polish

title: sx fails in non-TTY when using legacy invocation 'sx <query> -p' (empty stdin)
Rename -t flag from time-range to -r
description:
# Problem
-t flag is used for --time-range but conflicts with common convention of -t for --text

# Proposed Solution
- Change --time-range short flag from -t to -r (range)
- Reserve -t for --text output flag for consistency with scrpr
- Update documentation to reflect change

# Migration
This is a breaking change requiring major version bump

title: Show full result URLs by default
close_reason: Implemented in commit 81c945e: sx now prints full URLs for each result by default; docs and regression test added.

title: Change default behavior to non-interactive mode
description:
# Problem
Interactive TUI mode is currently the default, requiring -p/--np flag for scripting usage.

# Proposed Solution
- Make non-interactive the default behavior
- Add -i/--interactive flag for TUI mode
- Auto-detect: use TTY detection (interactive when stdout is terminal, non-interactive when piped)

# Benefits
- Follows Unix philosophy (silent by default)
- Scripts work without extra flags
- Less surprising behavior for CLI users

title: Add default output format to config
description:
# Problem
Config file lacks option to set default output format.

# Proposed Solution
Add to config.toml:


# Benefits
- Users can customize default behavior
- Reduces need for repetitive flags

title: Document sx+scrpr integration patterns
description: Document recommended usage patterns and pipelines combining sx and scrpr. Include: 1) Basic search-to-content pipeline with examples, 2) When to use sx --text vs sx | scrpr, 3) Rate limiting best practices, 4) Choosing extraction backends (local vs Tavily vs Jina), 5) Search backend selection (SearXNG vs Brave vs Tavily). Add to README or create PIPELINES.md.
